manifest.name: Template by Note Name

manifest.name: Templify

manifest.name: Tengwar

manifest.description: Run multiple agent CLI sessions (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, etc.) as editor tabs.

manifest.author: abduznik
manifest.name: Termux Bridge

manifest.author: ZyphrZero

manifest.name: Testing Vault
manifest.description: This allows a developer to make a random vault of arbitrary size for testing their plugins.

manifest.author: Llewellyn Paintsil
manifest.name: Tether
manifest.description: Sync your vault with Google Drive using your own Google Cloud credentials.

manifest.author: Christ Degni
manifest.name: Text Autocomplete
manifest.description: Autocomplete text to type more efficiently.

manifest.author: frankthwang
manifest.name: Text Block Timer
manifest.description: Add a timer to text block to enable count-up timing (Performance Improved!).

manifest.author: psyda
manifest.name: Text Color Tags
manifest.description: Simple and fast inline text coloring that feels native with $red, $#hex syntax. Clickable swatches, color picker, vault presets.

manifest.author: Juan D Frias
manifest.name: Text Conversions
manifest.description: Perform various text conversions on the selected text

manifest.author: Simon Cambier
manifest.name: Text Extractor

manifest.author: hafuhafu
manifest.name: Text Finder
manifest.description: Provides a find/replace window in edit mode similar to VSCode (supports regular expressions and case sensitivity).

manifest.author: usysrc
manifest.name: Text Focus
manifest.description: Focus the text area when creating new notes.

manifest.author: Hunter
manifest.name: Text Hider
manifest.description: Visually hides note text while editing to protect privacy in public.

manifest.author: Michael Adams
manifest.name: Text Progress Bar
manifest.description: Display low-fi text progress bars in your notes.

manifest.author: Ariana Khitrova
manifest.name: Text Snippets
manifest.description: Allows you to replace text templates for faster typing, create your own, expand text shortcuts.

manifest.name: Local Text Tools
manifest.description: Text manipulation commands: case conversion, line numbering, and more. Works with single and multiple selections.

manifest.author: ipshing
manifest.name: Text Transform
manifest.description: Transform text to different cases using the command palette or keyboard shortcuts.

manifest.author: Mani Batra
manifest.name: obsidian-text2anki-openai

manifest.author: luhaifeng666
manifest.name: Text2Audio
manifest.description: Convert text to speech

manifest.author: Miha Kralj
manifest.name: Text Analysis
manifest.description: Real-time text analysis on readability, structure, and complexity, incorporating over 30 tests like Average Syllables per Word, percent of difficult words, Lexical Diversity, Flesch Reading Ease Score, Gunning Fog Index, SMOG indes, Rix, Lix, Reading level and Reading/Speaking time. Built on top of textstat library.

manifest.author: tine-schreibt
manifest.name: textFlow
manifest.description: Compile multiple notes into a single editable flow - like Scrivenings. Define flows from DVQueries, folders/tags/props, or bookmarks. Edits are synced automatically between flows and their sources.

manifest.author: Akop Kesheshyan
manifest.name: Textgrams
manifest.description: Store and visualise ASCII graphics and charts

manifest.author: Max Margenot
manifest.name: Tezcat
manifest.description: Implements AI indexing and search to surface related thoughts to your current work. Look into the mirror.

manifest.author: MarsBatya
manifest.name: TG Emoji Search

manifest.description: Search and insert Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition monsters, spells, and items into notes.
